description.p: RViz plugin for displaying animated mesh markers. Based upon code from the rviz default_plugin for displaying mesh markers. Animations are ONLY supported in OGRE *.mesh + *.skeleton files, which can be exported using various third-party plugins from e.g. 3ds max or Blender.
Works similar to visualization_msgs/Marker; just use animated_marker_msgs/AnimatedMarker instead.
